title: atlas.knowledge.qa.v1 Output Schema
description: Output from Atlas Enterprise Knowledge QA. Returns a grounded answer with source citations and confidence score. No file attachments are returned.

answer.description: The generated answer to the question, grounded in the Responder's private knowledge base.

confidence.description: Overall confidence score for the answer, between 0.0 and 1.0. Scores below 0.6 indicate the knowledge base may not have sufficient coverage for this question.

sources.description: Source citations supporting the answer. Count is bounded by input.max_sources. Empty if no relevant sources were identified.

title.description: Display title of the source document or section.

excerpt.description: A brief excerpt from the source that directly supports the answer. May be omitted if the Responder's policy restricts raw text exposure.

relevance_score.description: Relevance score of this source to the question, between 0.0 and 1.0.

follow_up_questions.description: Optional list of suggested follow-up questions generated by the Responder's pipeline.

retrieval_coverage.description: High-level coverage assessment: 'full', 'partial', or 'none'. Helps Caller decide whether to escalate or rephrase.
